case_title: POCOROBA, MILLIE et al VS ROSSETTI, BENITO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POCOROBA, MILLIE POCOROBA, MARGIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, BENITO ROSSETTI, SABERENA COSTAIN, SONIA JANG, CAROLYN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,025.00, JUDGM. MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY POCOROBA, MILLIE POCOROBA, MARGIE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, BENITO ROSSETTI, SABERENA COSTAIN, SONIA JANG, CAROLYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
